delete.summary: Permanently delete account and all user data
delete.description: Permanently delete the authenticated user and all their data.

schema.title: Response Get Meals Api Meals Get
Response Get Meals History Api Meals History Get

post.description:
Atomic bulk endpoint: saves all onboarding data in one request.
Idempotent — safe to call multiple times (retries).

Recognize food in a photo and return extended nutrient data (v2).

Includes fiber, fat breakdown, micronutrients, and glycemic index.
Use `source` to control which data provider is used for nutrient values.

parameters.name: source

schema.description: Nutrient data source: 'auto' = cache→FatSecret→Claude, 'ai_only' = Claude only, 'fatsecret_only' = FatSecret (Claude fallback if not found)
schema.title: Source

parameters.description: Nutrient data source: 'auto' = cache→FatSecret→Claude, 'ai_only' = Claude only, 'fatsecret_only' = FatSecret (Claude fallback if not found)

post.description:
Parse a text meal description and return extended nutrient data (v2).

Includes fiber, fat breakdown, micronutrients, and glycemic index.
Use `source` to control which data provider is used for nutrient values.

parameters.name: source

schema.description: Nutrient data source: 'auto' = cache→FatSecret→Claude, 'ai_only' = Claude only (no FatSecret), 'fatsecret_only' = FatSecret only (Claude fallback if not found)
schema.title: Source

parameters.description: Nutrient data source: 'auto' = cache→FatSecret→Claude, 'ai_only' = Claude only (no FatSecret), 'fatsecret_only' = FatSecret only (Claude fallback if not found)

post.description:
Parse a text meal description and return extended per-100g nutrient suggestions (v2).

Useful for autocomplete / weight adjustment UI where per-100g values are needed.

Re-run recognition with a user correction comment.

Takes the list of currently recognized item names and a correction
string from the user, then returns an updated list of suggestions.
Parse user meal description into food groups with 3+ variants each for user selection.

post.description: Upload a ZIP of food photos; returns Excel/CSV with КБЖУ and data source per item.
Register or update FCM push token for the current user's device.

delete.description: Remove all FCM tokens for the current user (call on logout).

get.description: Return all users with their push notification registration status.

post.description: Send push notification to specific users by ID.
Send push notification to ALL users that have a registered FCM token.

get.description: Return notification send history, optionally filtered by user.

delete.description: Clear all chat history for the current user.

post.description: Send a user message and get the AI nutritionist's reply.

get.description: Return the user's current AI consent status (true / false / null if not set).

post.description: Upsert the user's AI consent decision.

get.description:
Look up a product by barcode.

Priority:
  1. FatSecret food.find_id_for_barcode.v2 — returns full nutrient profile
  2. OpenFoodFacts — fallback with basic macros
